text: Joaquin Niemann clinched his fifth LIV Golf League title of 2025 with a three-stroke victory at LIV Golf UK by JCB, held July 25–27, 2025 at JCB Golf & Country Club in Rocester, England, finishing at 18-under-par.

Legion XIII won the team title at LIV Golf UK by JCB, held July 25–27, 2025 at JCB Golf & Country Club in Rocester, England, finishing with a score of 35-under-par, eight strokes ahead of runner-up Torque GC.
As of August 5, 2025, Joaquin Niemann leads the season-long Individual Championship race with 206.80 points, Jon Rahm is second with 169.16 points, and Bryson DeChambeau third with 136.24 points.
